title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App
scenario: After onboarding with "Don't Allow" selected, tapping "Enable Now" on the Find My Device permission popup navigates to phone settings, and granting "While Using the App" permission returns to the FMD screen with the permission window dismissed.
steps: After onboarding, select "Don't Allow" when prompted for location permission.
Tap on App Settings > Find My Device.
Observe the permission popup with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" buttons.
In phone settings, grant "While Using the App" permission.
Observe the FMD screen is displayed and the permission window is dismissed.
expected: The FMD screen is displayed and the permission window is dismissed.
